missions.purpose: Skenuje RSS, Reddit a Twitter, identifikuje trendující příležitosti a vrací strukturovaný seznam scout items seřazený podle virality.
missions.currentState: Python agent (scout.py) je hotov, TypeScript wrapper v command-centrum je stub; RSS ingest není implementován.
missions.goal: Implementovat full Scout pipeline včetně RSS ingestu, dedupe a persistence raw scout items s idempotenčním klíčem.
successCriteria: RSS feeds načítány s timeout + retry policy

subMissions.name: Implementovat RSS ingest + parser
subMissions.description: Načíst aktivní RSS zdroje z DB/config, normalizovat do Scout item DTO včetně source metadata, per-source timeout + retry policy.

subMissions.name: Dedupe + persistence
subMissions.description: Upsert raw scout items do scout_items s idempotenčním klíčem (source+url+published_at). Detekovat stuck items (>30 min v SCOUTED).

subMissions.name: Parametrizovat virality score → priority
subMissions.description: Mapovat virality_score, urgency a content_potential z scout-python na HotDroppZ P0/P1/P2/P3 a category tagy.

subMissions.name: Integration testy s RSS fixtures
subMissions.description: 3–5 reprezentativních RSS feedů, simulovat timeout/parse failure, validovat persistence bez hacků.

subMissions.name: Scout run metriky
subMissions.description: Logovat itemsFound/itemsInserted/errorCount do scout_runs, alert pokud filter nemá co filtrovat (0 SCOUTED >5min).

missions.purpose: Filtruje SCOUTED items podle pravidel (negativní keywords, off-topic, self-promo, duplicates) — zabrání plýtvání Groq API.
missions.currentState: Rule-based filter funguje, 40+ keywords, Reddit junk detection, music relevance guard; chybí A/B testování thresholdů.
missions.goal: Optimalizovat precision/recall, přidat ML-based scoring pro dark launches, dokumentovat false-positive rate.
successCriteria: A/B run baseline vs strict s metrikami
False-positive rate < 5% (měřeno přes editorial recover akce)

subMissions.name: A/B test keyword thresholds
subMissions.description: Spustit 2 varianty filteru (baseline vs strict), měřit discard rate + downstream quality, ukládat variant_id pro analytics.

subMissions.name: Off-Topic + Self-Promo do DB
subMissions.description: Migrovat OFF_TOPIC_KEYWORDS a SELF_PROMO_PATTERNS do filter_rules tabulky s versioningem, live edity bez redeploy.

subMissions.name: Fallback scoring pro schválené zdroje
subMissions.description: Whitelist věrohodných zdrojů (Genius, Spotify, Pitchfork) — bypass filtru pro P0/P1 releases.

subMissions.name: Měřit false-positive rate
subMissions.description: Feedback loop: editoři označí chybně discarded items, precision per keyword, měsíční review.

missions.purpose: Přeloží SCOUTED items z 8 jazyků do EN master copy — vstup pro Curator.
missions.currentState: Stub vracející originál; Groq integration pending; anglická master copy kritická pro downstream.
missions.goal: Implementovat skutečný překlad přes Groq llama-3.1-8b, cachovat master copy, validovat UTF-8.
successCriteria: english_master sloupec populated pro 100% TRANSLATED items
Fallback na original při Groq failure

subMissions.name: Groq translation pro 8 jazyků
subMissions.description: Volat Groq s TRANSLATOR_SYSTEM, batch mode (10 items/call), timeout 30s, fallback vrátit originál.

subMissions.name: Schema: english_master + language_detected
subMissions.description: Migration ADD COLUMN english_master TEXT, language_detected na scout_items; backfill prázdné jako null.

subMissions.name: Skip CZ/SK native
subMissions.description: Pokud zdrojová řeč je CZ/SK, nepřekládat — copy do english_master s tagem; ušetřit Groq calls.

subMissions.name: Quality check výstupu
subMissions.description: Validovat min délka, absence placeholderů, entropy check; ukládat translation_confidence score.

subMissions.name: Cache pro common expressions
subMissions.description: Redis cache TTL 24h pro 100+ common hip-hop frází; snížit Groq load ~15%.

missions.purpose: Skóruje TRANSLATED items (0–20) — kategorie, klíčová slova, věrohodnost, recency.
missions.currentState: Rule-based scoring funguje, CATEGORY_WEIGHTS hardcoded, distribution enforcement. Chybí AI variant + A/B.
missions.goal: Přidat AI-based curator variant pro dark launch, kalibrovat thresholds, P0/P1 fast lane.
successCriteria: attention_score_ai sloupec populated paralelně s rule-based

subMissions.name: AI-based curator variant
subMissions.description: Groq CURATOR_SYSTEM, vrátit score+tags+reasoning paralelně s rule-based, store jako attention_score_ai pro A/B.

subMissions.name: CATEGORY_WEIGHTS do DB
subMissions.description: Migrovat hardcoded weights (droppz=12, usa_rap=9) do curator_category_weights tabulky, live adjustments.

subMissions.name: Drama/release detection rozšíření
subMissions.description: Groq extract entit (BIG_ARTISTS, labels, chart debuts); zvýšit precision vs keyword matching.

subMissions.name: Editor feedback loop
subMissions.description: CMS akce 'agree' / 'disagree' u curated items; měsíční precision report per kategorie.

missions.purpose: Grupuje CURATED items do story_clusters pomocí Jaccard similarity na entity seznam.
missions.currentState: Funguje, 7 fixů na entity extraction, thresholds 0.22–0.40 Jaccard, cross-run dedup. False merges potlačeny.
missions.goal: Optimalizovat entity extraction pro EU artists, přidat semantic similarity fallback, vylepšit merged_context relevance.
successCriteria: Semantic similarity fallback běží při Jaccard < threshold
Cluster regression test suite (10+ real cases) zelená

subMissions.name: ENTITY_ALIASES pro EU rapery
subMissions.description: Přidat 50+ emerging CZ/SK/PL/Balkán artistů, automatizovat sync s artist DB.

subMissions.name: Semantic similarity fallback
subMissions.description: Pokud Jaccard < threshold ale entity overlap vysoký, zkusit cosine similarity na embeddings (Groq embed).

subMissions.name: Merged_context sentence ranking
subMissions.description: TF-IDF na entity relevance + frequency, vybrat top 10 nejinformativnějších vět místo prvních 3.

subMissions.name: Kvantifikovat cluster quality
subMissions.description: Metriky: intra-cluster entity overlap %, confidence vs merged count; cluster_runs tabulka, měsíční report.

subMissions.name: Optimalizovat cross-run dedup
subMissions.description: Hash-based fast-path, denormalizovaný entity set jako JSON na clusteru; scaling pro 1000+ clusterů.

subMissions.name: Regression test suite
subMissions.description: 10+ real-world clusterů kde starý algoritmus selhal a nový vyhraje; gating před cluster.ts edits.

missions.purpose: Obohacuje pending clusters o Spotify/YouTube/Genius/Apple Music URLs, artist intel, AI image selection.
missions.currentState: Funguje, 4 external API paralelně, AI image picker běží; chybí graceful degradation pri API výpadku.
missions.goal: Graceful degradation, artist-to-genre mapping, optimalizace rate-limitu.
successCriteria: Spotify rate limit < 45 req/s s back-off

subMissions.name: Fallback generic imagery
subMissions.description: Category-based fallback (rap → default mic, culture → city skyline) přes local asset server.

subMissions.name: Artist → genre + region mapping
subMissions.description: Genre z Spotify artist tags (rap/rnb/pop) + EU country detection; store na artist record.

subMissions.name: Spotify rate limiting + caching
subMissions.description: Queue + back-off, cache popular artists TTL 24h; throughput stabilní pod 45 req/s.

subMissions.name: Release announcement lag tracking
subMissions.description: Měřit latenci zdroj publish → detect; alert pokud > 2 dny (stale sources).

subMissions.name: Confidence scoring na matched artist
subMissions.description: Float 0–1 z string similarity + Spotify popularity + historical match rate místo bool.

missions.purpose: Generuje publikovatelné články z enriched clusterů — vstup merged_context + metadata, výstup title/body/JSON.
missions.currentState: Stub s notImplemented=true; TODO implementační popis existuje, Groq integration pending.
missions.goal: Plná implementace Groq generation, template rewrite pro feed cards, hallucination detection, fallbacky.
successCriteria: Writer vrací 4 varianty (full, news, social, thread) per cluster
Fallback nikdy nekrachne — vždy vrátí draft

subMissions.name: Article generation pipeline
subMissions.description: Groq WRITER_SYSTEM, title + 500-800 word body, max 2000 output tokens, timeout 45s, fallback na cluster title.

subMissions.name: Template-based rewrite (feed cards)
subMissions.description: 1 article → 3 varianty (short 100w, medium 300w, snippet 50w); store všechny.

subMissions.name: Hallucination detection
subMissions.description: Entity jména musí být v merged_context; Groq fact-check + regex; confidence score per article.

subMissions.name: Tone-of-voice enforcement
subMissions.description: Short sentences, no 'As an AI', strong hooks; post-generation validator + rewrite prompt.

subMissions.name: Fallback strategie
subMissions.description: Pri Groq failure: cluster title + merged_context jako draft + log error; never crash.

subMissions.name: Integrace s Factory V2
subMissions.description: Writer output (title + variants) napojit na template binder v FactoryCoordinatorV2.

missions.purpose: Konvertuje enriched clusters + writer articles do feed_posts (MusicCard, VideoCard, AlbumCard).

missions.purpose: Identifikuje P0/P1 release drops, klasifikuje urgency, triggeruje fast-lane curator bypass.

subMissions.name: AI confidence scoring

subMissions.name: Auto-publish P0 drops

subMissions.name: Push notifikace + webhooks

subMissions.name: Měřit P0 accuracy
subMissions.description: Editor rating 'on_time' / 'late' / 'false_positive'; měsíční precision/recall; adjust threshold pokud < 90%.

missions.purpose: Sjednotit migraci schématu — replikabilní deployment + eliminovat manuální kroky onboardingu.
missions.currentState: 30+ fragmentovaných SQL souborů v Supabase, INSTALL_ORDER.md neaktualizovaný, riziko divergence PostgreSQL vs Supabase.
missions.goal: Single MASTER_SCHEMA.sql s versionováním + health checkem + CI gate.

subMissions.name: Konsolidace MASTER_SCHEMA.sql
subMissions.description: Ověřit že obsahuje všech 8 pipeline tabulek; přidat timestamp versioning + checksum validation.

subMissions.name: Migration order manifest
subMissions.description: MANIFEST.json: version, tables[], checksum + dependency mapping (FK pořadí).

subMissions.name: Schema health check
subMissions.description: pytest/sql skript ověří všechny tabulky/sloupce/indexy/FK po `supabase db push`.

subMissions.name: install-schema.sh single command
subMissions.description: Stáhne MASTER_SCHEMA, spustí `supabase db push`, health check, reportuje status.

subMissions.name: CI/CD gate na schema validation
subMissions.description: GitHub workflow schema-validation.yml spustí health check na merge; schema nesmí divergovat.

missions.purpose: Eliminovat divergenci PostgreSQL Article / Supabase feed_posts / JSON file stores; migrovat vše na Supabase.
missions.currentState: scout_items v Supabase, Article model v PostgreSQL (nepoužívaný), writer_results.json + creator_queue.json jako primární store; bez atomických writes.
missions.goal: Všechny pipeline stage data v Supabase s transakcemi; JSON/PostgreSQL jen cache/archive.
successCriteria: creator_queue.json → Supabase queue tabulka s locks
pipeline_run table pro end-to-end stage tracking

subMissions.name: Audit PostgreSQL Article model
subMissions.description: Grep API routes + services; seznam nepoužívaných fieldů + routes.

subMissions.name: writer_results.json → feed_posts
subMissions.description: Přepsat routes na Supabase reads; atomic writes s temp table pattern.

subMissions.name: creator_queue.json → Supabase queue
subMissions.description: Tabulka creator_queue, Python runner direct DB writes, lock/idempotency na queue operations.

subMissions.name: Decommission Article model
subMissions.description: Pokud nepoužívá, smazat Prisma model + migration; pokud archive, readonly snapshot.

subMissions.name: pipeline_run table
subMissions.description: Sloupce run_id, stage, status, started_at, ended_at, error_code; všechny stage logují; debugging stage failures.

missions.purpose: API stabilita frontend ↔ backend ↔ Python runner; detekovat breaking changes před deployem.

missions.goal: E2E pro Scout → Feed, OpenAPI validation, contract testing v CI.

subMissions.name: Sjednotit API URL fallback

subMissions.name: E2E Scout → Feed test

subMissions.name: Request/response validation middleware
subMissions.description: Zod/io-ts unified; middleware na /api/v1/*; runtime type checking.

subMissions.name: Breaking change detection v CI
subMissions.description: swagger-cli porovnání main vs branch; fail pokud removing fields bez deprecation.

missions.purpose: Detekovat + auto-updatovat zastaralé/zranitelné balíčky across všech runtime.

npm audit + safety check fail build na high/critical

subMissions.name: GitHub Dependabot setup
subMissions.description: .github/dependabot.yml; enable npm (backend, CC, frontend-web), pip (ai); weekly + patch/minor.

subMissions.name: CI workflow audit + safety
subMissions.description: dependency-audit.yml; npm audit --audit-level=moderate + safety check; fail high/critical.

subMissions.name: Python requirements pinning
subMissions.description: ai/requirements.txt na pinované verze (==); poetry.lock nebo pip-compile.

subMissions.name: Weekly Slack report
subMissions.description: GitHub Actions schedule; npm audit --json → parse high/critical → Slack.

subMissions.name: Dependabot auto-merge patches
subMissions.description: GitHub Actions auto-merge Dependabot PR pro patch updates pokud testy projdou; minor/major manual.

missions.purpose: Metriky + alerty pro queue depth, approval rates, processing latency, worker zdraví.
missions.currentState: P2 observability BLOCKED; pipeline events nestandardizované; Sentry + UptimeRobot není setup.
missions.goal: PostAnalytics instrumentováno, Sentry live, custom Slack alerts.
successCriteria: P95 latency SLO monitoring + Slack alerts

subMissions.name: Pipeline event schema
subMissions.description: timestamp, stage, run_id, status, duration_ms, item_count, error_code; persist do PostAnalytics.

subMissions.name: Sentry integrace

subMissions.name: Queue health metriky

subMissions.name: Processing latency SLO
subMissions.description: P95 per stage (Scout 30s, Writer 60s, Feed 10s); daily query, alert P95 > target * 1.2.

subMissions.name: UptimeRobot heartbeat
subMissions.description: /health endpoint vrací {status, pipeline_age_minutes}; UptimeRobot ping 5min; Slack downtime.

missions.purpose: Zamezit neomezenému růstu tabulek a ztrátě performance bez archivace.
missions.currentState: processed_urls roste bez cleanup, scout_items bez retention, readHistory bez archivace.
missions.goal: Weekly cleanup crons, TTL na temp tabulky, archivace staré records.

subMissions.name: Cleanup processed_urls
subMissions.description: Weekly cron: DELETE WHERE last_seen < NOW() - 7 days; log deleted count.

subMissions.name: scout_items retention
subMissions.description: Staré > 30 dní → archive table; monthly job; archive queryable mimo hot path.

subMissions.name: ReadHistory archivace
subMissions.description: read_history_archive tabulka; monthly job přesune staré records; analytical union obou.

subMissions.name: Growth monitoring
subMissions.description: Daily query pg_total_relation_size; Slack alert na anomální growth.

subMissions.name: TTL indexy
subMissions.description: PostgreSQL 14+ TTL index na session/temp records; create_time + '7 days' → auto delete.

missions.purpose: Zamezit performance regressům — EXPLAIN ANALYZE guardrails + N+1 detection.
missions.currentState: Feed Promise.all (bezpečné nyní ale křehké); chybí composite indexy; žádné query profiling v CI.
missions.goal: EXPLAIN ANALYZE gating, N+1 linting rule, benchmark baseline.
successCriteria: Composite index na feed_posts (status, aiScore, publishedAt)

subMissions.name: Composite indexy feed query
subMissions.description: Migration @@index([status, aiScore, publishedAt]); EXPLAIN ANALYZE; benchmark before/after.

subMissions.name: N+1 linting + checklist
subMissions.description: ESLint rule pro nested db queries bez Promise.all; code review checklist.

subMissions.name: Slow query log monitoring
subMissions.description: log_min_duration_statement=1000; export logging sink; Slack alert > 5s; weekly report.

subMissions.name: Benchmark suite
subMissions.description: Targets: feed personalized < 300ms, cluster merge < 500ms, writer gen < 30s; before/after migrations.

subMissions.name: EXPLAIN ANALYZE gating
subMissions.description: Pre-commit hook: Prisma migrations měnící indexy → EXPLAIN; fail pokud seq scan vs index scan.

missions.purpose: Debugging pipeline failures + compliance; replay-able pipeline history.
missions.currentState: Status flow jen v updated_at; žádná transition history; nelze audit kdo/kdy.
missions.goal: status_history JSON column, audit_log tabulka, /api/v1/items/:id/replay endpoint.

subMissions.name: status_history JSON column
subMissions.description: Migration: jsonb na scout_items default [{status, changed_at, reason, user_id}]; trigger on status change.

subMissions.name: audit_log tabulka
subMissions.description: id, entity_type, entity_id, action, changes, changed_by, changed_at; trigger na scout_items + feed_posts + clusters.

subMissions.name: /items/:id/history endpoint
subMissions.description: Query status_history + audit_log; chronologický seznam s timestamps + reasons.

subMissions.name: /items/:id/replay endpoint

subMissions.name: Pipeline failure triage UI
